old_value: {"id":"AB-rwh","title":"Dashboard coverage P0: surface AgentTasks parse failures","description":"Fix silent failure in AgentTasksViewModel where malformed bd JSON currently yields empty tasks with no error. Update parsing/load flow to surface an explicit error state, and add tests proving malformed payloads do not render as empty-success.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"blake.crane@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T17:03:12Z","created_by":"Blake Crane","updated_at":"2026-02-27T17:03:12Z"}

{"id":"AB-dxu","title":"Dashboard coverage P0: expose gateway session refresh failures","description":"AppState.refreshGatewaySessions currently swallows all errors, which can leave dashboard/session widgets blank with no user feedback. Add explicit error surfacing and tests for failure and recovery paths.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"blake.crane@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T17:05:20Z","created_by":"Blake Crane","updated_at":"2026-02-27T17:05:20Z"}

{"id":"AB-04b","title":"Dashboard coverage: functional tests for History filtering","description":"Add functional tests that verify History filters change outcomes: project menu, event-type segmented control, and date-range menu. Assert row counts/content change with filter selection, not just control existence.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"blake.crane@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T17:03:20Z","created_by":"Blake Crane","updated_at":"2026-02-27T17:03:20Z"}

{"id":"AB-l0w","title":"Dashboard coverage: functional tests for Agents widgets","description":"Add functional tests for Agents dashboard widgets: sessions stats chips, session table ordering/values, and handoff row expansion behavior. Cover both populated and empty states using controlled data.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"blake.crane@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T17:03:19Z","created_by":"Blake Crane","updated_at":"2026-02-27T17:03:19Z"}

{"id":"AB-qrd","title":"Dashboard coverage: header/nav and panel state behavior tests","description":"Add functional tests for dashboard-level navigation and state widgets: project header stats updates, tab switching behavior, right-panel collapse/expand toggle, and unread badge reset behavior.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"blake.crane@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T17:03:24Z","created_by":"Blake Crane","updated_at":"2026-02-27T17:03:24Z"}

{"id":"AB-c4j","title":"Dashboard coverage: Agent Tasks board interaction tests","description":"Add tests for Agent Tasks dashboard interactions: create-task validation/success, completed toggle, task detail save/close behavior, and drag/drop reassignment path where testable. Include integration-style coverage for JSON parsing from real bd list payload fixtures.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"blake.crane@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T17:03:20Z","created_by":"Blake Crane","updated_at":"2026-02-27T17:03:20Z"}
